name: Asparagus with Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the asparagus and break into 1 to 1 1/2-inch lengths.
2. Heat the butter in a wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Sauté quickly until just beginning to color, being careful not to overcook.
4. Add asparagus and stir-fry for an additional 5 minutes. Ensure that the asparagus remains crisp.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients and serve.
